columns.name: avdnr
columns.description: The division number associated with the record

columns.name: sone
columns.description: An amount related to sone, a unit of measurement for liquids

columns.name: fraDato
columns.description: The start date for the record validity period

columns.name: tilDato
columns.description: The end date for the record validity period

columns.name: refusjon
columns.description: Indicates if a refusal has occurred, typically 'Y' or 'N'

columns.name: tidspunkt
columns.description: The timestamp when the record was created or last updated

columns.name: bruker
columns.description: The user who created or last modified the record
